## Security and handoff

- [ ] Remote handoffs, if any, were sanitized and minimized.
- [ ] No secret values, authentication material, private documents, personal

## Checklist

- [ ] The diff matches one task specification, one branch, and one PR.
- [ ] Code and tests/gates agree with the approved scope and accepted ADRs.
- [ ] Relevant checks and `git diff --check` pass.
- [ ] Failures and not-run checks are reported explicitly.
- [ ] No force, reset, rebase, admin override, or disabled TLS was used without
      separate explicit owner authorization.
- [ ] This PR is Draft unless the owner explicitly requested otherwise.
- [ ] Merge, auto-merge, and deployment remain unperformed pending separate
      owner authorization.
